## Checklist
- [ ] Changes are scoped and cohesive; no unrelated refactors
- [ ] Tests added/updated as appropriate
- [ ] Docs/ADR added if this introduces a sticky decision (dependency, public API, protocol, multi-tenant boundary)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or internal-only notes included
- [ ] Migration notes included (if schema/config changed)
